title: Mamata Banerjee protest LIVE: Mamata's protest for nephew today in Kolkata; ex-CM dares BJP to arrest her
description: Mamata Banerjee protest LIVE: TMC supremo Mamata Banerjee has planned a protest today at Kolkata's Rani Rashmoni Avenue over attacks on party leaders, including her nephew Abhishek Banerjee, and Railways' hawker eviction drive.
